articles.title: PM warns Burnham against immediate leadership challenge if he wins by-election
articles.description: Keir Starmer says Labour should focus on a subsequent Manchester mayoral race if Andy Burnham wins in Makerfield.

articles.title: High-street designs and skateboard tracksuits - what England's off-pitch looks say about the team
articles.description: What experts make of the men's team's official off-duty fashion as they prepare for their first World Cup match.

articles.title: Israel launches fresh strikes on Lebanon despite Trump criticism
articles.description: Speaking on Tuesday, Trump said Israel's PM Benjamin Netanyahu needed "to be more responsible with respect to Lebanon".

articles.title: Jeremy Clarkson reveals prostate cancer diagnosis on farming show
articles.description: The former Top Gear presenter did not clarify what type of cancer he had been diagnosed with.
